rules.name: setup_and_credentials
rules.overview: Detailed setup instructions for getting credentials wired safely and confirming the SDK can reach IBM Cloud. Read this when the developer is at Phase 1 of the workflow.

var.name: WATSONX_APIKEY
var.desc: IBM Cloud API key with permissions on watsonx.governance (and watsonx.ai if using LLM-judge metrics).
var.find: IBM Cloud console → Manage → Access (IAM) → API keys → Create
var.format: ~44 chars, mixed case, may contain underscores and hyphens.

var.name: WXG_SERVICE_INSTANCE_ID
var.find: IBM Cloud console → Resource list → click the watsonx.governance instance → copy the GUID field.

var.name: WXG_PROJECT_ID
var.desc: watsonx project ID. ONLY required for the 3 LLM-as-judge metrics (Answer Completeness, Conciseness, Tool Call Relevance).
var.find: dataplatform.cloud.ibm.com → your project → Manage tab → General → copy Project ID.
var.note: The watsonx.ai project must have a Watson Machine Learning (WML) service associated. To check: project → Manage → Services and Integrations. If missing: Associate service → Watson Machine Learning → New service (free tier is fine).

var.name: WATSONX_URL
var.desc: Override the regional endpoint. Default: https://us-south.ml.cloud.ibm.com
var.find: Match the region of your watsonx instances.

var.name: WXG_JUDGE_MODEL_ID
var.desc: Override the LLM-as-judge model. Default: llama-3-3-70b-instruct
var.find: dataplatform.cloud.ibm.com → project → Models → use any available model ID.

env_var_threshold_overrides.slug_rules: Metric name uppercased, non-alphanumerics replaced with underscores. Examples: "PII Detection" → GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_PII_DETECTION "HAP (Hate, Abuse, Profanity)" → GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_HAP_HATE_ABUSE_PROFANITY "Faithfulness" → GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_FAITHFULNESS
env_var_threshold_overrides.category_shortcuts: GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_SAFETY GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_RAG (applies to both rag_generation and rag_retrieval) GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_QUALITY GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_TOPIC GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_PATTERN GUARDRAILS_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT_TOOL_CALL

env_file_security.rule: Always chmod 600 the .env file. Never world-readable.
Always add .env to .gitignore. The package's own .gitignore does this — but verify in the partner's repo.
Use `read -s` to enter the API key without it appearing in shell history.
env_file_security.pattern: read -s -p "WATSONX_APIKEY: " key cat >> .env <<EOF WATSONX_APIKEY=$key EOF unset key chmod 600 .env
env_file_security.rule: If a partner accidentally pastes their API key into chat, into a public PR, or commits it to a public repo: rotate immediately at IBM Cloud → Manage → Access (IAM) → API keys → Delete the leaked key.

service.name: watsonx.governance
service.provisioning: IBM Cloud console → Catalog → search "watsonx.governance" → choose region → Create. Subscription/seat-based licensing; Granite Guardian calls included.

service.name: watsonx.ai project
service.provisioning: https://dataplatform.cloud.ibm.com → Projects → New project → name + storage. Then Manage → Services and Integrations → Associate Service → Watson Machine Learning.
service.cost_note: Pay-per-token foundation model inference. Each LLM-judge call uses ~200-500 input + ~10 output tokens. For high-volume, sample (e.g. 10% of traffic).

service.name: WML (Watson Machine Learning)
service.provisioning: Must be associated with the watsonx.ai project. From inside the project: Manage → Services and Integrations → Associate Service → Watson Machine Learning → New service (free tier OK for testing). Without this, LLM-judge metrics fail with "project_id ... is not associated with a WML instance".

error.msg: ConfigError: Missing required environment variable(s): WATSONX_APIKEY
error.cause: The shell where the SDK is being invoked doesn't have the env var exported.
error.fix: Use `set -a; source .env; set +a; python ...` or `bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && python ...'`.

error.cause: SDK installed without the [metrics] extra. The gov SDK declares unitxt as an optional dep inside the [metrics] extra.

error.msg: EvaluatorInitError: Failed to initialize ibm_watsonx_gov MetricsEvaluator
error.cause: API key invalid, lacks permissions, or service instance ID wrong.
error.fix: (1) Re-check IDs in IBM Cloud → Resource list → Instance → GUID field. (2) Confirm the API key has IAM access on the governance service.

error.msg: project_id ... is not associated with a WML instance
error.fix: In the project: Manage → Services and Integrations → Associate Service → Watson Machine Learning.

error.cause: WATSONX_URL is set to the wrong region for your watsonx instance.
error.fix: Set WATSONX_URL to match instance region: us-south, eu-de, eu-gb, jp-tok, or au-syd.

error.msg: UnknownMetricError: 'Conciseness (LLM Judge)' (or 'Answer Completeness' or 'Tool Call Relevance')
error.cause: WXG_PROJECT_ID is not set — those 3 metrics are dropped from the registry.
error.fix: Either (a) set WXG_PROJECT_ID + associate WML, or (b) don't request those metrics.
